episodes.examination_text: 64F with exertional chest pain over 3 weeks, relieved by rest. No dyspnea at rest. ECG: sinus rhythm, no acute ST changes. Working diagnosis: stable angina. Plan: start beta-blocker, lipid panel, outpatient stress test.
Follow-up. Chest pain improved on atenolol. Reports mild fatigue. BP 128/78, HR 64. Continue current therapy; review LFTs given new statin.
